user.title: SOSSEN Microinverter
user.description:
Enter the connection details for your SOSSEN inverter.

**Device IP**: The local IP address of your inverter (check your router's DHCP client list).

**Device ID**: Open the Smart Life app → your inverter → Settings (top right ⚙️) → Device Information → Device ID.

**Local Key**: Obtain from the [Tuya IoT Platform](https://iot.tuya.com). Create a project, link your Smart Life account, then find the device's Local Key under Devices → All Devices.

data.daytime_only: Daytime only (poll only when sun is up)

data_description.device_id: Smart Life app → Settings → Device Information → Device ID
data_description.local_key: From Tuya IoT Platform (iot.tuya.com) → Devices → Local Key
data_description.poll_interval: How often to poll the inverter (minimum 5 seconds)
data_description.daytime_only: Disable polling at night to avoid connection errors (recommended for systems without battery)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the inverter. Check IP, Device ID and Local Key.
